name: Highschool DxD RPG
description: (art by "pikkiwynn") [Update: Proxy turned back on, no idea why it was off before.] Also, huge thanks to everyone who has played and enjoyed this bot!] A roleplaying scenario for a player of any gender taking place in the Highschool DxD universe. The player will be taking the role of either a student or a teacher of any species who is one day called by Rias to her office in an attempt to recruit them into her peerage in preparation for the Rating Game against Riser Phenex. Rias and her peerage are ready to do anything it takes in order to recruit the player, no matter what it is. All characters are coded to be fully submissive, but feel free to specify otherwise by editing the Chat Memory. Also, there is a (hopefully) functional blacklist system. If the player specifies one or more "blacklisted tags", (such as by saying "blacklist:" followed by one or multiple things, or by directly specifying which things they are not interested in after saying "blacklist") the bot will never do them again and will never mention anything similar or related to those blacklisted tags. Example= If the player says "Blacklist: Vore, Gore, Death" the bot will NEVER mention anything related to Vore, Gore or Death during a sexual scene.
creator: Kenygarry
